mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url, FALSE as liked FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked
FALSE as liked
FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked
FALSE as liked
FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked
FALSE as liked
FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.root_id = #{rootId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC LIMIT 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked,
FALSE as liked,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.root_id ORDER BY c.created_at ASC) AS rn FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.root_id IN
#{rootId}
AND c.status = 1 ) sub WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY root_id, created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.root_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.id as author_id, u.username as author_username, u.nickname as author_nickname, u.avatar_url as author_avatar_url, ru.id as reply_to_id, ru.username as reply_to_username, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname, ru.avatar_url as reply_to_avatar_url,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as liked
FALSE as liked
FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.root_id = #{rootId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, root_id, reply_to_user_id, like_count, reply_count, status) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{likeCount}, #{replyCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comments SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comments SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comments SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comments SET reply_count = reply_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{rootId}
UPDATE comments SET reply_count = GREATEST(reply_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{rootId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO comment_likes (user_id, comment_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'comment' as type, u.id as from_user_id, u.nickname as from_nickname, u.avatar_url as from_avatar_url, p.id as post_id, COALESCE(p.title, '') as post_title, c.id as comment_id, COALESCE(SUBSTRING(c.content, 1, 100), '') as comment_content, c.created_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN posts p ON c.post_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND c.user_id != #{userId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.parent_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reply' as type, u.id as from_user_id, u.nickname as from_nickname, u.avatar_url as from_avatar_url, p.id as post_id, COALESCE(p.title, '') as post_title, c.id as comment_id, COALESCE(SUBSTRING(c.content, 1, 100), '') as comment_content, c.created_at FROM comments c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN posts p ON c.post_id = p.id WHERE c.reply_to_user_id = #{userId} AND c.user_id != #{userId} AND c.status = 1 ) AS comment_notifications ORDER BY created_at DESC
